services.name: Part Manufacturing
services.shortDescription: Complete precision part manufacturing solutions using advanced CNC technology.
services.description: Our Part Manufacturing service delivers high-precision components using state-of-the-art CNC machinery. From prototype to production, we handle projects of all sizes with consistent quality and on-time delivery.

processes.name: Turning
processes.description: Precision turning operations for cylindrical components using CNC lathes with tight tolerances up to IT6 grade.

processes.name: Milling
processes.description: 3-axis and 5-axis milling for complex geometries, pockets, and contours on various materials.

processes.name: Drilling
processes.description: High-precision drilling operations including deep hole drilling, step drilling, and counter boring.

processes.name: Tapping
processes.description: Thread cutting for internal threads using CNC rigid tapping and form tapping methods.

processes.name: VMC Operations
processes.description: Multi-operation machining on Vertical Machining Centers for complete parts in single setups.

processes.name: CNC Lathe
processes.description: Advanced turning operations with live tooling capability for complex turned-milled parts.

services.name: Machine Manufacturing
services.shortDescription: Custom machine design and manufacturing for industrial automation needs.
services.description: We design and manufacture custom industrial machines tailored to your specific production requirements. Our engineering team works closely with clients from concept to commissioning.

processes.name: Design Engineering
processes.description: Complete machine design using CAD/CAM software with FEA analysis for optimal performance.

processes.name: Fabrication
processes.description: Precision fabrication of machine structures using quality materials and processes.

processes.name: Assembly
processes.description: Expert assembly of mechanical, electrical, and pneumatic systems.

processes.name: Testing
processes.description: Comprehensive testing and validation before delivery to ensure specifications are met.

services.name: Maintenance & Support
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive maintenance services to keep your machines running at peak efficiency.
services.description: Our maintenance services ensure your machinery operates at optimal efficiency. We offer preventive maintenance programs, emergency repairs, and spare parts support.

processes.name: Preventive Maintenance
processes.description: Scheduled maintenance programs to prevent unexpected breakdowns and extend machine life.

processes.name: Breakdown Support
processes.description: Rapid response for emergency repairs to minimize production downtime.

processes.name: Spare Parts
processes.description: Genuine spare parts supply with inventory management support.

processes.name: Training
processes.description: Operator and maintenance training for your team.

facility.description: Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility is equipped with modern CNC machines, quality inspection equipment, and skilled workforce to deliver precision engineering solutions.

images.caption: Our CNC machining area with latest equipment
Well-equipped tool room for fixtures and jigs
